ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Unique slug for the player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is currently on */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Current head coach of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., stadium name) */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Referees officiating the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular, playoffs) */,
  "playoffs_round" TEXT /* Playoffs round (e.g., first round, conference finals) */,
  "playoffs_game" INTEGER /* Playoffs game number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being accessed (e.g., player, game) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., guaranteed, non-guaranteed) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "cap_hit" REAL /* Cap hit of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., out, day-to-day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, All-Star) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
